Make an initial guess of an 'effective' mixing matrix

Source: R/map_onto_noswitch.R
make_initial_guess.Rd

Function takes the mixing and switching matrices to be reproduced and applies an operator to them to make the 'effective' mixing matrix. That is, the matrix that if

Usage

make_initial_guess(mix_mat, switch_mat, parameterisation)

Arguments

mix_mat

The contacts between different activity classes (and within) those activity classes.

switch_mat

Describes the transitions between the different activity classes.

parameterisation

The parameterisation (other than the mix/switch) matrices. So, recovery rate, transmission rate, etc.
